headline: Semis & AI lead at +86 score; Consumer Staples worst at −52 as PEP misses; July 14 CPI + bank earnings = week's defining moment.
Iran ceasefire collapse sparks oil spike and VIX jump — Energy & Defense surge to fresh highs while Semis break their 50-day and Consumer Discretionary crumbles under rate + fuel pressure.
Iran ceasefire collapse sends oil +5% and XLE surging; semiconductors extend losses 13% off highs; FOMC minutes at 2PM ET are today's binary risk for the entire tape.
Financials & Biotech lead into Q2 earnings; Semiconductors under Samsung-driven pressure — rotate to income & defense, avoid chip longs pre-FOMC minutes.
Tech leads (+74) as post-correction AI base rebuilds; Energy collapses (−58) as Iran ceasefire + OPEC+ hike flood oil market; FOMC July 29 and June CPI (~Jul 15) are the twin override risks.
